ideation: This sequence depicts the robot wielding an axe, starting with the axe held high, ready to strike, then bringing it down in a chopping motion, before returning to the starting position.  The right arm will be used to hold the axe. The left arm will start at the side and then raise slightly to balance the swing.  The axe will be represented by the orientation of the wrist and hand.  We'll check examples to ensure the movement is fluid and realistic, despite the robot's lack of elbows.

frames.beat: right arm raises axe high, left arm balances
axe swings down in a powerful chop
arms reset, axe held ready again
